title: Non-record submission: baseline_sp1024, val_bpb=1.3479(on single H100), AbhiShet108
author: AbhiShet108

data.description: Increased MATRIX_LR from 0.04 to 0.08 to test learning-rate sensitivity on a single H100.

novel_contributions: Learning-rate sensitivity experiment with MATRIX_LR doubled from 0.04 to 0.08
Single-H100 non-record baseline run for the 10min/16MB track
Documentation of compute and storage constraints affecting training
